name: mdy-daf-companion
description: Claude Code plugin that opens the latest MDY Daf Yomi shiur in a floating Electron companion.

scripts.package:companion: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-companion-package.mjs && electron-packager desktop/electron mdy-daf-companion --out=out --overwrite --executable-name=mdy-daf-companion && node scripts/verify-companion-package.mjs
scripts.package:companion:win: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-companion-package.mjs --platform=win32 --arch=x64 && electron-packager desktop/electron mdy-daf-companion --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=out --overwrite --executable-name=mdy-daf-companion && node scripts/verify-companion-package.mjs --platform=win32 --arch=x64
scripts.package:companion:mac: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-companion-package.mjs --platform=darwin --arch=arm64,x64 && electron-packager desktop/electron mdy-daf-companion --platform=darwin --arch=arm64,x64 --out=out --overwrite --executable-name=mdy-daf-companion && node scripts/verify-companion-package.mjs --platform=darwin --arch=arm64,x64
scripts.package:companion:linux: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-companion-package.mjs --platform=linux --arch=x64 && electron-packager desktop/electron mdy-daf-companion --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=out --overwrite --executable-name=mdy-daf-companion && node scripts/verify-companion-package.mjs --platform=linux --arch=x64
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run validate:plugin && npm run smoke
scripts.release:prepare: npm run check && npm run verify:current-daf && npm run verify:npm-package
scripts.release:prepare:win: npm run package:companion:win && npm run check && npm run verify:current-daf && npm run verify:npm-package
